lines.speaker: Monk
lines.text: Greetings traveller.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can you heal me? I'm injured.

lines.speaker: Monk
lines.text: Ok.

lines.speaker: Monk
lines.text: Sorry, no.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Isn't this place built a bit out of the way?

lines.speaker: Monk
lines.text: We like it that way actually! We get disturbed less. We still get rather a large amount of travellers looking for sanctuary and healing here as it is!

sections.title: Interacting with the south-western ladder before joining the Edgeville Monastery order

lines.speaker: Monk
lines.text: Only members of our order can go up there. You'll need to talk to Abbot Langley if you want to explore the monastery further.

lines.speaker: Monk
lines.text: Greetings traveller.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can you heal me? I'm injured.

lines.speaker: Monk
lines.text: Ok.

lines.speaker: Monk
lines.text: Sorry, no.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Isn't this place built a bit out of the way?

lines.speaker: Monk
lines.text: We like it that way actually! We get disturbed less. We still get rather a large amount of travellers looking for sanctuary and healing here as it is!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How do I get further into the monastery?

lines.speaker: Monk
lines.text: You'll need to talk to Abbot Langley about that. He's usually to be found walking the halls of the monastery.

lines.speaker: Monk
lines.text: Greetings traveller.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can you heal me? I'm injured.

lines.speaker: Monk
lines.text: Ok.

lines.speaker: Monk
lines.text: Sorry, no.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What are you doing here?

lines.speaker: Monk
lines.text: We offer sanctuary to those seeking the guidance of Saradomin.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What if I want guidance from another god?

lines.speaker: Monk
lines.text: If Saradomin's not good enough for you, those otherworldly freaks from Arceuus are probably your kind of people.

lines.speaker: Monk
lines.text: They're always looking for hidden knowledge about souls and spirits, when any sensible person would just trust in Saradomin.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I see.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks.

lines.speaker: Monk
lines.text: Peace brother
